items.zh: DeepSeek V4 即将发布，将运行在华为昇腾芯片上——阿里、字节、腾讯已大批量订购华为芯片
items.en: DeepSeek V4 imminent, will run on Huawei Ascend chips — Alibaba, ByteDance, Tencent bulk-ordering Huawei chips

items.zh: 马斯克要求参与 SpaceX IPO 的银行、律所和审计机构必须订阅 Grok AI
items.en: Musk forces banks, law firms & auditors working on SpaceX IPO to subscribe to Grok AI

items.zh: Ledger CTO 警告：AI 正让加密攻击变得更便宜更快，迫使安全体系全面重新审视
items.en: Ledger CTO warns AI is making crypto hacks cheaper and faster, forcing security rethink

items.zh: Bloomberg 深度：「Vibe Coding」成为 AI 编程新潮流——但 AI 生产力内卷可能先把人卷崩
items.en: Bloomberg: 'Vibe Coding' is the new AI trend — but AI productivitymaxxing may burn us out first

items.zh: Google 虚拟试穿技术将于 4 月 30 日直接嵌入搜索结果，AI 重塑零售购物体验
items.en: Google's AI virtual try-on tech to launch within search results on April 30, reshaping retail

items.zh: Drift Protocol 确认 2.7 亿美元攻击为朝鲜情报机构策划——伪装量化交易公司潜伏 6 个月，甚至当面开会+存入 100 万美元
items.en: Drift confirms $270M exploit was a 6-month North Korean intelligence operation — attackers posed as quant firm, met in person & deposited $1M+

items.zh: 嘉信理财 (Charles Schwab) 确认上半年推出 BTC 和 ETH 现货交易，开放候补名单
items.en: Charles Schwab confirms spot BTC & ETH trading launch in H1 2026, opens waitlist

items.zh: BTC 约 $67,100，窄幅震荡（$65K-$73K），社交媒体看空情绪创近期新高
items.en: BTC around $67,100, range-bound ($65K-$73K); social media bearish sentiment at recent highs

items.zh: BNB 报 $592，较去年 10 月高点 $1,375 下跌 57%，Maxwell 升级改善可扩展性
items.en: BNB at $592, down 57% from October peak of $1,375; Maxwell Upgrade improves scalability

items.zh: 特朗普「解放日」一周年再加码：对进口品牌药征 100% 关税，钢铝关税同步调整
items.en: Trump doubles down on tariff anniversary: 100% tariff on brand-name pharma imports, steel & aluminum adjustments

items.zh: S&P 500 上周大涨近 6%，终结五周连跌，创去年 11 月以来最佳单周表现；期货今日微弱波动
items.en: S&P 500 surged ~6% last week, snapping 5-week losing streak — best weekly gain since late Nov; futures flat today

items.zh: 美伊战争进入第 36 天：被击落 F-15E 第二名机组成员获救；油价上行推动期货下滑
items.en: US-Iran war Day 36: second crew member from downed F-15E rescued; rising oil prices weigh on futures

items.zh: 纳斯达克推进 23/5 交易计划，并探索市场代币化和单股期权每日到期
items.en: Nasdaq working on 23/5 stock trading, tokenizing markets, and daily single-stock options expirations
